sources.title: The Evil Woods 2007 Dvdrip
sources.description: A group of teenagers take a weekend camping trip to party, have fun and relax. After pitching tent in a desolate area, they become panicked when a stranger startles them and warns of the killer ghost in the woods.

metadata.Plot: A group of teenagers take a weekend camping trip to party, have fun and relax. After pitching tent in a desolate area, they become panicked when a stranger startles them and warns of the killer ghost in the woods.
metadata.Actors: Brian Burns, Tamara Czartoryski-Borbon, Dedan Donovan
